items.title: Home Depot vs. Floor & Decor: Which Stock Has Greater Upside?
items.description: HD's scale, digital gains and Pro strength give it an edge over FND, which faces housing-driven headwinds.

items.title: Assessing Home Depot Stock After Recent Sales Growth Fails to Meet Analyst Expectations
items.description: Trying to figure out what’s next for Home Depot stock? You are not alone. With shares closing at $410.91 and posting a solid 70.4% gain over the past 5 years, it is no wonder investors keep circling back to this home improvement giant. While the recent numbers might look less exciting—a 2.5% dip over the past week and a modest 0.5% slide in the past month—the year-to-date return still sits at a comfortable 5.8%. Even with only a 5% gain over the last year, long-term holders are likely pleased...
